content:
https://roc-lang.org has been updated for the new compiler :octopus:

:sparkles: some highlights:

  • New builtin docs.
  • Install scripts for the new compiler nightlies.
  • Every page is now using the latest Roc syntax.

The old website is still available at https://alpha4.roc-lang.org/
Like it 👍🏼 Try Roc, Code Sample and so on follow at a later point?

Yes

  • Try Roc could be added now
  • Code Sample and Examples should probably be done after basic-cli is ported, which I am working on now.

https://github.com/roc-lang/www.roc-lang.org/blob/61b4bcc9824d8b51a256d418ace7faf148152906/website/content/friendly.md?plain=1#L62-L70

Looks like something that was intended to be commented out is not - altho the linked issue appears to be merged.
